about: Software Engineer building full-stack applications, terminal UIs, and AI-powered tools. With a foundation in enterprise infrastructure and systems engineering, I bring a strong focus on automation, reliability, and scalable architecture to every project I build. I work across the stack — from React and Swift frontends to Node.js and Go backends — and enjoy solving problems that bridge hardware and software.

projects.name: Artifex
projects.desc: Self-hosted AI image gallery with ML-powered auto-tagging, NSFW detection, and federation

projects.desc: Kanban-style task management system for autonomous AI developer agents

projects.name: mdtask
projects.desc: Terminal task manager CLI using Markdown files with YAML frontmatter, published to npm

projects.desc: Bookmark manager REST API with JWT auth, pagination, and OpenAPI/Swagger documentation

projects.desc: Steam Deck plugin that plays theme music on game pages via Decky Loader

projects.name: Terminal Portfolio
projects.desc: SSH-accessible terminal portfolio built with Go and the Charm Bracelet ecosystem
